published_prior_art.cite: Rosenbaum1987SensitivityPermutation — bounded-odds randomization sensitivity inference supplies the composite-null p-value argument
Rosenbaum2007M — Gamma=1 restores a single randomization distribution; the displayed reversal equality is an elementary specialization
none — no checked paper gives this particular opposite-tail finite instance

repo_prior_art.cite: none — stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax supplies credited fixtures, not an encoded-input certificate and strictness-cell problem

published_prior_art.cite: Rosenbaum2007M and Zhao2019SensitivityValue use directional/doubled-tail workflows; FogartySmall2016MultipleComparisons shares assignment probabilities across outcomes; Rosenbaum2018Stratified and CohenOlsonFogarty2020AdversarialGame do not supply this exact finite two-tail certificate

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / Fisher-sharp-null scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Finite-sample validity and certification are conditional on the Fisher sharp null and the conditional Rosenbaum product-law model, not weak-null effect heterogeneity.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Exact shared-law two-tail calibration UNDER the Fisher-sharp-null Rosenbaum product-law model.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / rational computational domain
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Exact certification is claimed only for finitely encoded rational scores, alpha, and Gamma; no polynomial complexity claim is made.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Finite terminating exact-rational certification ON the stated rational encoded-input domain.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: State a verifier input/output specification that defines “without enumerating the full product family” and give an explicit termination or certificate-size bound in terms of input bits, n, and the m_i.
Add a generic sufficient condition, stated in observable score geometry, under which p_J<p_B; retain d-dagger as an exhibit rather than the sole strictness demonstration.
Benchmark the exact certificate against the conservative heterogeneous-stratum calculation of Rosenbaum2018Stratified on a documented small heterogeneous-set family.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the kernel bound to the Fisher-sharp-null rational-input scope; require an explicit algorithmic termination/certificate specification in the derivation.
